title: HarperDB Root Configuration
description: JSON Schema for harperdb-config.yaml as documented in docs.html. This focuses on the primary, documented configuration sections and keys. Unknown properties are allowed for forward compatibility.

rootPath.description: Root folder where Harper persists data, config, logs, and components. Default: user's home directory

componentsRoot.description: Path to the folder containing local component files. Default: <ROOTPATH>/components

http.description: HTTP server configuration for the main component server.

sessionAffinity.description: Route multiple requests from the same client to the same thread. Use 'ip' or a header name.

compressionThreshold.description: Responses larger than this threshold (bytes) will be compressed for clients that accept compression. Default: 1200

cors.description: Enable Cross Origin Resource Sharing. Default: true

corsAccessList.description: List of allowed origins for CORS.

corsAccessControlAllowHeaders.description: Comma-separated list of header keys for Access-Control-Allow-Headers on OPTIONS requests. Default: 'Accept, Content-Type, Authorization'

headersTimeout.description: Milliseconds to wait for complete HTTP headers. Default: 60000

maxHeaderSize.description: Maximum allowed size of HTTP headers in bytes. Default: 16394

requestQueueLimit.description: Max estimated request queue time (ms) before rejecting with 503. Default: 20000

keepAliveTimeout.description: Keep-alive inactivity timeout in ms. Default: 30000

securePort.description: HTTPS port. Requires valid certificate + key.

mtls.description: Enable and configure mTLS authentication for HTTP.

user.description: Authenticate all authorized mTLS connections as this user. Default: common name from certificate or null to not auto-auth.

required.description: Require client certificates for all HTTP connections. Default: false

failureMode.description: Global behavior when verification fails. Default: 'fail-closed'

timeout.description: Max ms to wait for CRL download. Default: 10000

gracePeriod.description: Grace period after CRL nextUpdate (ms). Default: 86400000

timeout.description: Max ms to wait for OCSP response. Default: 5000

cacheTtl.description: Cache TTL for successful OCSP (ms). Default: 3600000

errorCacheTtl.description: Cache TTL for OCSP errors (ms). Default: 300000

timing.description: Log timing information for HTTP requests.

count.description: Number of worker threads. Default: logical CPU count minus one

port.description: Port for debugging the main thread (default 9229)

startingPort.description: Starting port to assign unique debugging ports per thread

heapSnapshotNearLimit.description: Take a heap snapshot when near the heap limit.

replication.description: Harper replication configuration for clustering and data replication.

databases.description: Databases to replicate. '*' for all, array of names, or array with objects to mark sharded databases.

routes.description: Routes to connect to other nodes. Each route can be a string or an object with hostname, port, and optional startTime.

startTime.description: ISO 8601 UTC start time to begin replication.

revokedCertificates.description: Array of revoked certificate serial numbers.

enableRootCAs.description: Verify certificates against Node.js bundled CA store. Default: true

mtls.description: mTLS settings for replication connections (always required).

certificateVerification.description: Enable certificate revocation checking (CRL/OCSP) for peer certificates.

blobTimeout.description: Max time (ms) to wait for blob transfer. Default: 120000

failOver.description: Attempt fail-over to different node when unreachable. Default: true

enabled.description: Enable local Harper Studio GUI. Default: false

auditLog.description: Enable structured table transaction logging. Default: false

level.description: Verbosity of text event logs. Default: warn

console.description: Log console.* output to log file. Default: true

root.description: Directory where log files are written. Default: <ROOTPATH>/log

compress.description: Compress rotated logs with gzip. Default: false

path.description: Directory to store rotated logs. Default: <ROOTPATH>/log

logFailed.description: Log failed authentication events. Default: false

logSuccessful.description: Log successful authentication events. Default: false

external.description: Logging configuration for external components that use the logger API.

authorizeLocal.description: Automatically authorize requests from loopback IP as superuser. Default: true

cacheTTL.description: Milliseconds an authentication can be cached. Default: 30000

operationsApi.description: Operations API configuration. Values default to http configuration when not provided.

domainSocket.description: Unix domain socket path for CLI access. Default: <ROOTPATH>/hdb/operations-server

tls.description: TLS configuration overriding root TLS for Operations API

writeAsync.description: Disable fsync for faster writes (risk of data loss on crash). Default: false

caching.description: Enable in-memory caching of records. Default: true

threshold.description: Only entries larger than this many bytes will be compressed.

compactOnStart.description: Compact non-system databases on start. Default: false

compactOnStartKeepBackup.description: Keep backups created by compactOnStart. Default: false

maxTransactionQueueTime.description: Max write queue time before rejecting (e.g. '45s').

noReadAhead.description: Advise OS to not read ahead. Default: false

prefetchWrites.description: Load data prior to write transactions. Default: true

path.description: Directory for all database files. Default: <rootPath>/database

blobPaths.description: Path or array of paths for blob storage. Default: <rootPath>/blobs

pageSize.description: Database page size (bytes). Default: OS default

tls.description: TLS certificates/keys/settings for HTTPS and MQTT. Can be a single object or an array (SNI).

webSocket.description: Enable MQTT over WebSockets (on http port). Default: true

requireAuthentication.description: Require authentication for MQTT connections. Default: true

user.description: Authenticate all authorized mTLS connections as this user (or null for none). Default: Common Name

required.description: Require client certificates for all MQTT connections. Default: false

certificateAuthority.description: Override CA path for MQTT. Default: tls.certificateAuthority

timeout.description: Max ms to wait for OCSP response. Default: 5000

cacheTtl.description: Cache TTL (ms) for verification results. Default: 3600000

databases.description: Optional mapping of databases and tables to file system paths.

path.description: Path for all files of this database.

auditPath.description: Path for audit log database files for this database.

aggregatePeriod.description: Seconds between aggregation of raw analytics. Default: 60

replicate.description: Replicate aggregated analytics across cluster. Default: false

privateKey.description: Path to private key file. Default: <ROOTPATH>/keys/privateKey.pem

host.description: Optional SNI host this certificate applies to.
